flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Sinte Gleska University rose 49% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.2k → $4.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Sinte Gleska University rose 49% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.2k → $4.7k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Sinte Gleska University rose 200% between 2021 and 2024 (33.3% → 100.0%).
